reason:
Agent successfully granted GitHub access and attempted to fetch user data, but proxy configuration error prevented retrieval of GitHub username
  Bugs found:
    - GitHub OAuth proxy not properly configured: The proxy returns "Bad credentials" when calling `api.github.com/user`, and the `CONNECTED_ACCOUNTS` environment variable is empty. The OAuth token is not being injected by the proxy, preventing the agent from retrieving the GitHub username. The agent reports: "The GitHub account was granted, but the proxy is returning 'Bad credentials' when calling `api.github.com/user`, and `CONNECTED_ACCOUNTS` is empty. The OAuth token isn't being injected by the proxy. You may need to reconnect the GitHub account, or there's a misconfiguration on the proxy side. I wasn't able to retrieve your username."
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar visible
Clicked on "QA-20260508-020357-qxag" agent in sidebar — Agent opened and landing page displayed
Verified agent status — Status was "idle" (meets requirement of "running" or "idle")

Typed and sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message sent, agent status changed to "working", session created as "GitHub Username Verification Request"
Grant #1: Clicked "Allow Access" button to grant GitHub account access — Granted access to GitHub service
Grant #2: Clicked "Allow Once" in permission dialog for GET /user endpoint — Allowed GitHub user endpoint access
Grant #3: Clicked "Allow" for second request to GET /user endpoint — Allowed second GitHub user endpoint request
Grant #4: Clicked "Allow Once" in second permission dialog — Allowed with "Allow Once" option
Grant #5: Clicked "Allow" for GET / (API root) request — Allowed GitHub API root endpoint
Grant #6: Clicked "Allow Once" in third permission dialog — Allowed with "Allow Once" option

Waited for agent response (total 3m 8s) — Agent completed but response indicates proxy failure: "The GitHub account was granted, but the proxy is returning 'Bad credentials' when calling `api.github.com/user`, and `CONNECTED_ACCOUNTS` is empty. The OAuth token isn't being injected by the proxy... I wasn't able to retrieve your username."

Verified response includes GitHub username — FAILED: Response does not include a GitHub username; instead it explains that the username could not be retrieved due to proxy OAuth token injection failure
bugs: GitHub OAuth proxy not properly configured: The proxy returns "Bad credentials" when calling `api.github.com/user`, and the `CONNECTED_ACCOUNTS` environment variable is empty. The OAuth token is not being injected by the proxy, preventing the agent from retrieving the GitHub username. The agent reports: "The GitHub account was granted, but the proxy is returning 'Bad credentials' when calling `api.github.com/user`, and `CONNECTED_ACCOUNTS` is empty. The OAuth token isn't being injected by the proxy. You may need to reconnect the GitHub account, or there's a misconfiguration on the proxy side. I wasn't able to retrieve your username."
